name: Fay's Apple Crumb Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle bottom crust with tapioca.
2. Pare apples; cut into eighths and arrange in a 9-inch pastry-lined pie pan.
3. Sprinkle raisins over the apples.
4. Mix half of the sugar with cinnamon and sprinkle over the top of the apples and raisins.
5. Sift remaining sugar with flour; cut in butter until crumbly. Sprinkle over the apples.
6. Cover with top crust.
7. Mix 1 tablespoon sugar with 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon for brushing on the top crust.
8. Brush 2 tablespoons milk over the top crust and sprinkle with the cinnamon/sugar mixture.
9. Cut gashes in the top for venting.
10. Bake in a hot oven (450 degrees) for 10 minutes, then in a moderate oven (350 degrees) for about 40 minutes.
This is my absolute favorite apple pie. I think it's good warm topped with a piece of cheddar cheese. My customers were crazy about it. Judy Garnett pjxg05a.
